Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now that we have received intel from command, we can safely assume that any radar contacts in the marked search area are hostile.
Continue to move your reconnaissance aircraft closer to the marked search area. Also, give your ships a waypoint near the marked area to close the distance.

Remember that you can see the range of the SS-N-3B missiles aboard Varyag by either clicking on the missile in the bottom bar (to see a red range circle), or by using the Unit Reference to see their max range. Bring your formation within range of the SS-N-3B missiles before launching the attack!
